rationale.D1: YAGSL config dir confirms vendored swerve abstraction (D1-L2 signal), but all mechanism subsystems (PivotSubsystem, ShooterSubsystem, etc.) own hardware directly via LoggedTalonFX with no *IO interface — no interface+2-impl pattern found anywhere outside the vision camera ProcessorInterface (domain-specific, not a hardware-decoupling layer).
rationale.D2: Superstructure.configureTriggers() maps field zones to multi-subsystem commands via WPILib Triggers, with real guarded transitions (waitUntil isPivotSafe, isTurretSafe) inside SuperstructureCommands; this is a genuine goal-fanout coordinator, not a holder.
rationale.D3: SwerveSubsystem.simulationPeriodic() calls drivetrain.updateSimState() (CTRE sim), VisionSubsystem wires PhotonCameraSim in sim mode and updates it from pose, BumpSim does custom tilt visualization — drivetrain+vision sim is real; no WPILib mechanism physics (ElevatorSim/FlywheelSim) for non-drive mechanisms.
rationale.D4: No src/test directory exists; CI workflow runs ./gradlew build (and a 30-second simulation smoke test) but no gradle test task — zero unit tests confirmed.
rationale.D5: DataLogManager.start() writes a timestamped .wpilog file on real hardware; every subsystem publishes typed NetworkTables structs (StructPublisher<Rotation2d>, DoublePublisher, etc.) and an Elastic layout (elastic-layout.json) is committed — systematic structured logging without AdvantageKit.
rationale.D6: No PathPlanner or Choreo files found; team uses a custom BLine library (FollowPath, Path with per-segment constraints) for on-the-fly trajectory generation with velocity overshoot, a ComplexAutoChooser with many named segments, and DriveToPOI align-to-target — sophisticated bespoke path following comparable to PathPlanner adoption with pose-align commands.
rationale.D7: Multi-camera fusion (PhotonProcessor + LimelightProcessor via ProcessorInterface), PoseFusionEngine with outlier rejection and weighted fusion, std-dev tuning in StdDevCalculator, turreted camera with ConcurrentTimeBuffer for latency-compensated yaw, and addVisionMeasurement wired through SwerveSubsystem — fused and filtered estimation without a dedicated RobotState world-model class.
rationale.D8: GitHub Actions CI runs build + 30-second simulation smoke test on push/PR, README includes control maps, eclipse-formatter.xml committed, 5 seasons of history tracked in the corpus — no evidence of a separate maintained team library repo.
